arabic: زُرْتُ الْمَدِينَةَ الْقَدِيمَةَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِي بِالْأَمْسِ. مَشَيْنَا فِي الشَّوَارِعِ الضَّيِّقَةِ وَشَاهَدْنَا الْمَبَانِيَ التَّارِيخِيَّةَ الْجَمِيلَةَ. اِشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ مِنَ السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ. تَنَاوَلْنَا الْغَدَاءَ فِي مَطْعَمٍ تَقْلِيدِيٍّ مَشْهُورٍ. كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذاً جِدّاً وَالْجَوُّ رَائِعاً.
translation: Jučer sam sa prijateljima posjetio stari grad. Šetali smo uskim ulicama i razgledali lijepe historijske građevine. Kupio sam nekoliko suvenira na narodnoj pijaci. Ručali smo u poznatom tradicionalnom restoranu. Hrana je bila veoma ukusna, a atmosfera predivna.
translationEn: I visited the old city with my friends yesterday. We walked through the narrow streets and saw the beautiful historical buildings. I bought some souvenirs from the traditional market. We had lunch in a famous traditional restaurant. The food was very delicious and the atmosphere was wonderful.
